summary: Project includes embedded YouTube Shorts tutorial videos. User requested reducing the number of videos by one and replacing the remaining videos with two specific YouTube Shorts URLs.
architectural_notes: Embedded YouTube Shorts videos are used for tutorials on the site. Current videos: https://youtube.com/shorts/JqKmxZaWp-c and https://youtube.com/shorts/gdBxIyO-cIg

existing_features.title: Update the TutorialsSection component to display exactly two embedded YouTube Shorts videos (down from three), replacing all current videos with the following URLs: https://youtube.com/shorts/JqKmxZaWp-c?si=7E8QCHCfhrr6MbST and https://youtube.com/shorts/gdBxIyO-cIg?si=JrNJOLP8-MV1Ov8w. Remove the third video card entirely. Maintain the existing 9:16 portrait aspect ratio embed style and layout.
